subcodes.first_line: O ye beloved servants of the Most Glorious One, His honour Aqa Muhammad Isma'il, companion of the Spirit of Gabriel, and this letter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حضرت ابهانن سوگلی قوللری جناب آقا محمد اسمعیل نفس جبریله همدم و بو مکتوبک
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
